query: Uganda Ebola Bundibugyo virus outbreak 2026 latest confirmed case count July 2026, any new case after 20 cumulative
answer:
I've completed the research and submitted my structured findings. 

**Key answer to the question:** As of mid-July 2026, **Uganda's Bundibugyo Ebola case count remains at 20 cumulative confirmed cases — no new case has been reported beyond 20.** The Uganda Ministry of Health dashboard (12 July 2026), ECDC (10 July), WHO, and ebolamap all confirm 20 cases with 2 deaths. The last confirmed Ugandan case was reported on **21 June 2026**, and with 0 active contacts remaining under follow-up, Uganda's transmission chain appears contained — a sharp contrast to the DRC, where cases surged past 1,790.

sources.title: Ebola Updates — Uganda Ministry of Health Daily Dashboard
sources.snippet: As of Sunday, 12 July 2026 (Updated yesterday): 20 Cumulative confirmed cases; 15 Imported Cases, 5 Local cases; 1 Current admission; 17 Recoveries; 2 Cumulative deaths; 2482 total persons tested; 831 contacts listed; 0 active contacts; 821 completed 21-day follow-up.

sources.title: Ebola disease outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Uganda
sources.snippet: Updated 10 July 2026. Uganda 20 confirmed cases, 2 deaths, 16 recoveries. The last confirmed case was reported on 21 June and no new cases have been reported since then. 15 cases DRC-linked, 5 local.

sources.title: Ebola disease caused by Bundibugyo virus, Democratic Republic of the Congo & Uganda (WHO DON612)
sources.snippet: 1481 confirmed cases total; 1460 from DRC, 20 from Uganda, and one from France (linked to DRC); 454 deaths including two from Uganda.

sources.title: Disease Outbreak News: Ebola caused by Bundibugyo virus, DRC & Uganda (3 July 2026)
sources.snippet: As of 2 July, Uganda has reported 20 confirmed cases including two deaths, as well as one probable case who has died.

sources.title: Ebola Map — Live Global Ebola Outbreak Tracker
sources.snippet: As of 8 July (DRC)/9 July (Uganda): DRC 1,792 confirmed cases and 625 deaths; Uganda 20 confirmed cases and 2 deaths; outbreak total 1,812 cases and 627 deaths (CFR ~35%).

sources.title: 2026 Ebola epidemic - Wikipedia
sources.snippet: Caused by Bundibugyo ebolavirus. PHEIC declared by WHO on 16 May 2026. 702 confirmed deaths in DRC and two deaths in Uganda as of the second week of July.

sources.title: Uganda: Bundibugyo Ebola Virus Disease Outbreak 2026 - DREF Operational Update (MDRUG058)
sources.snippet: Outbreak declared by Uganda Ministry of Health on 15 May 2026, linked to Kampala (Kibuli Hospital). Index case a 59-year-old male from DRC who died the same day.

data_points.metric: Uganda cumulative confirmed Bundibugyo Ebola cases
